profile.education: Dartmouth College (BA, History); Harvard Law School (JD)
profile.background: Attorney; North Carolina state senator (2009-2016); Attorney General (2017-2025); became 76th governor and first Jewish governor of North Carolina in 2025.

profile.education: University of Maryland University College (BS Technology Management)
profile.background: Former North Carolina Speaker of the House. IBM and PricewaterhouseCoopers technology consultant. First in family to earn college degree at age 36. In Senate since 2015.

profile.education: Appalachian State University (BBA), Dallas Theological Seminary (MA Theology), Wake Forest University (MBA)
profile.background: Gun store owner and former U.S. House member. Grew up on a cattle and chicken farm in Davie County. Served three terms in Congress before winning Senate seat in 2022.
